meaning: n.司木露(一种伏特加酒的商标名)
examples: Diageo's brands include Smirnoff vodka, Johnnie Walker Scotch whiskey, and Guinness stout.
Who is the real Bondman? Jointly with Smirnoff to look forward!
Diageo's brands include Smirnoff vodka, Johnnie Walker scotch whisky, and Guinness stout.
For two years Smirnoff published the magazine whenever he had the money to put one out.
At one point during Wozniak's and Smirnoff's samba, judge Bruno Tonioli put his face in his hands.
